'''Bos''' was a [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] in the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and [[Commander/Legends|commander]] of [[Bravo Flight (New Republic)|Bravo Flight]], a group of [[T-65BR X-wing reconnaissance starfighter|T-65BR X-wing reconnaissance fighters]] that had escorted the [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] ''[[Tampion]]'' before it was ambushed and captured by the [[Yevetha]]. Bravo Flight were later debriefed by [[New Republic Intelligence Service|New Republic Intelligence]].

{{Char-stub}}
